arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich supervisory board members Uli Hoeneß and Karl-Heinz Rummenigge played key role in pulling Joshua Kimmich’s offer
arts.sum: As we found out on Thursday, Bayern Munich pulled its offer from the negotiation table, but now we know whose decision ti was to do that — the supervisory board led by Uli Hoeneß and Karl-Heinz Rummenigge: According to a report from Sport1 (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ), Bayern Munich is perplexed as to what is going on with Joshua Kimmich and why it has taken him so long to make a decision on his future with the club.

arts.ttl: Breaking: Bayern Munich’s Aleksandar Pavlović out with illness vs. VfB Stuttgart per report
arts.sum: According to Tz journalist Philipp Kessler, Bayern Munich midfielder Aleksandar Pavlović will miss today’s Bundesliga match against VfB Stuttgart due to an illness. Looking for more thoughts and analysis on Bayern Munich’s Bundesliga showdown with VfB Stuttgart?

arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich star Joshua Kimmich heavily weighing offers from Arsenal, one other Premier League club
arts.sum: Arsenal have been one of the clubs showing concrete interest in Joshua Kimmich and have held talks with the player. The Premier League side would like to sign Kimmich on a free transfer as a possible replacement for Jorginho.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs VfB Sttugart: Bayern facing fresh injury news as well as optimistic comebacks
arts.sum: As reported by Philipp Kessler and Torben Hoffmann, Bayern Munich is facing fresh injury concerns and hopeful comebacks ahead of their game against VfB Stuttgart on Friday evening. A win…

arts.ttl: Incredible stat showcases Michael Olise’s brilliance
arts.sum: Only Jamal Musiala (€140m) and Harry Kane (€90m) have a higher market value than Michael Olise (€65m), according to Transfermarkt, and the Frenchman is already showing his worth to his…

arts.ttl: Arsenal interested in signing Kimmich on a free
arts.sum: Arsenal are interested in signing Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich, Sky in Germany are reporting.

arts.ttl: Report: Pavlovic to miss Bayern's clash with Stuttgart
arts.sum: Aleksandar Pavlovic will reportedly not be able to feature for Bayern against Stuttgart on Friday night.

arts.ttl: Alonso has no plans to rest players ahead of Bayern clash
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen coach Xabi Alonso says he has no plans to rotate his squad heavily against Eintracht Frankfurt with the midweek Champions League clash against Bayern Munich in mind.

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'hold talks' over free transfer for Bayern Munich star as £18.2m 'hesitation' revealed
arts.sum: Arsenal reportedly hold talks over a free transfer for Bayern Munich midfielder Joshua Kimmich following an impasse in contract talks with the German giants.

arts.ttl: “I was in my boxers!”: Neymar recalls nearly joining Bayern Munich
arts.sum: But in a recent interview, Neymar revealed that he nearly ended up at Bayern Munich, playing under Pep Guardiola. Guardiola, who had recently left Barcelona, wanted Neymar to join him at his next club, but Neymar was less-than-prepared for the offer.
